name: E-Document Messages Spike
brief: Spike validating the V3 architecture for E-Document Messages: separate-table model, Type/Reader/Writer split, framework-as-executor, bi-directional flow.
description: Non-production exploratory code accompanying docs/e-document-messages_V3.md. Defines the new framework primitives (E-Document Message table, Type/Reader/Writer interfaces, Apply Context codeunit, IMessageReceiver, message lookup modal) and exercises them through a fictional ContosoInvoice XML format with a ContosoInvoiceAck message. Demonstrates all four V3 quadrants (outbound/inbound × Document/Message). Not for production. Files marked 'Spike:' in source comments are candidates to move to E-Document Core.
